reviews.review_title: Cool game but needs more songs
reviews.review_description: Love the game, love the interface etc..  but there need to be way more songs on that song list..  or a way to upload ones own songs..  Like this the game will not live very long.

I bought this game when it first came out because of the promise that in EARLY 2025 there would be song packs (multiple) coming.  It's now late-ish 2025 with nothing and no news about anything. The game is great and very fun to play but we REALLY need those packs....
This has a pretty good and varied set list but I'm still waiting for more....

Welp it seems like those promised DLC packs ain’t coming anytime soon. Quite a shame cause I was looking forward to those. Besides that this game could really use a preview option so you have an idea of what the song sounds like. Not everyone knows all these songs from memory so.

developer_response.body: Hey Timmy! Thanks for your feedback here. We are currently working tirelessly on adding Multiplayer (along with song previews and other cool stuff) so please check back soon for a massive update with new tunes, added features and more very soon!

reviews.review_description: It's a great little game, easy to play and there is a leader board for each level of each song so it's nice to see where you place when you play. Hopefully they will update and add more music 🎶  the little range of what they have is nice though and the game play is fun 😁

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We are planning to add more songs in the future, so stay tuned to our socials for more information!

reviews.review_description: Another fun game in the rhythm genre, this one utilizes the quirks of the VR medium to evolve karaoke from a procedural experience by adding game elements such as catching items to the music as you sing along. Looking forward to the soundtrack expanding the library to more options in the future.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review! We're glad you're along for the ride!

reviews.review_description: I have watched this from the beginning and am truly blown away by all of it!  Love to Bella’s Dad and the young man who helped design everything.  Proud to have such a wonderful talented family member who could bring together the crew who made this possible.  I just spent an hour singing and I’m bummed because my headset needs to charge for an hour!!!!   War Eagle…Word

I guess I'm jaded because I love IRL karaoke so much, but I didn't get the bang for the buck I expected. I can't tell any difference between the singing difficulties. There's no hints to tell me if there's something I'm missing, like what happens when I catch butterflies, or put my hands up? It looks like a good start, and it's visually intriguing. But I'm going to request a refund, and check in later when it's had some upgrades.

I tried Songbird until my headset died, and it was pretty good, if you want to sing the same song over and over and over again. Not many songs to choose from that I know or even want to try to sing, so there's that. I think more songs would be helpful, for the price there's not much to choose from. It was less enjoyable, when the words went missing. Instruction would be helpful, like a walk thru on how to use it, and set it up so you can follow it. I give it 3 stars because I believe it has good potential with some changes and additions. As this is right now, I couldn't recommend purchasing this app.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We're actively working to expand the song library and improve setup instructions to make Songbird more enjoyable for everyone. We hope you’ll check back as we continue to update and grow!

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome! If you've played Rock Band with the microphone, you know what to generally expect from this game, but it's so much more than that. Instead of just demanding you sing well (which it does of course), it keeps you engaged by throwing objects your way for points and tells you to do fun stuff with your hands while singing, like for example, putting your hands up and doing an air guitar motion! Proud to be an owner of the game. :)

Overall, the idea of the game is good - but there are things that need some work.  The UI is incredibly confusing with the look "left", look "right" especially when there are buttons under the main menu that do nothing (apparently they're just to tell you to look left/right).   And there are no previews of songs when highlighted or even other items like microphones.  Also, in VR mode (versus MR), the text is hard to read and overall on the Quest 3, the graphics could use some improvement.    Only giving it 3 stars as it needs more polishing.  I'll revisit this when/if the app gets an update to resolve these things.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We understand how important a clear and intuitive UI is, and we've noted your suggestions. We look forward to seeing you again after our future updates!

reviews.review_description:
Love this app but I wish there was more songs to choose from. I’m from the 70’s era. 
Need more songs to choose from. Don’t know most of them.

developer_response.body: Thanks for you review! We're looking forward to offering more songs in the future. Make sure to follow our socials for updates on new song drops!

reviews.review_description: Fun. Who doesn't like to sing along to songs? With a few more tweaks, this would be an amazing experience for karaoke in VR using licensed songs. Current set list is great with a lot of variety in terms of genre and voice ranges. Notes: Add song preview while selecting songs. Need a more intricate rating system rather than just points and getting a single star whether you did well or not as long as you finished the song. Better explanation for the butterflies and leaves mechanics and what they actually do. Don't place the note tracking bar on the mic but maybe under the TV screen instead because it's hard to look at the mic while singing into it. The backdrops are nothing special. Could there maybe be an addition where you're in a soundstage or doing a concert in front of a crowd? Maybe some animals as the audience. I don't really care for multiplayer, but I've seen others asking for it. Other than that, I'm happy with the purchase. I know new songs are coming in the future and I cannot wait to play more and sing more.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the kind words and thoughtful suggestions! We're glad you’re enjoying your time with Songbird, and we want to ensure to you that we're taking this early feedback to heart. Our goal is to create the most joy-filled and frictionless experience possible, and ideas like song previews and enhanced backdrops are exactly the kind of improvements we’re excited to explore. Stay tuned for more updates and new songs!

reviews.review_description: Oh man, I haven’t had so much fun in VR for a long time. Love the little dancing prompts and caching power ups, it’s so silly lol. If you love singing, this app is a must have. You can actually improve you skills as well! Could be also a nice party game with casting.

let me say first     this game is an unique and enjoyable experience       but    im returning it    not based on the quality of the game ,based on the quality of my singing    it made me very self aware of how bad my singing actually is     kinda takes a little of the fun away     I think ill stick to singing badly wearing my bose earpods with noise canceling turned on

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for trying Songbird and for your kind words! Remember, it's all about fun, not perfection. We'd love to welcome you back whenever you're ready to let your voice shine!

reviews.review_description: But I love it! Can’t wait for more songs!

Picked this up last night and had a great time belting out some songs in the privacy of my kitchen, haha. I look forward to exposing my family to this game and seeing what kind of fun we have with it. Not sure if there are multiplayer capabilities yet, but hopefully there are because we’d have a great time with it. It’s got a pretty solid setlist to begin with, and I’m eager to see what kind of song packs arrive in the future. I hope to see additional themed locations in the future as well, with more fun audience creatures to sing to. And I’m sure you all are getting a ton of song requests at this point, but PLEASE add a Magdalena Bay artist pack at some point in the future (maybe with a environment theme to match). They’re my absolute favorite band and they’re so fun to karaoke to. To conclude though, this was a great karaoke experience as is, and I am so excited to see how this game develops with future updates! 😁🎤🎶

Such a pitch-perfect delight! VR is long overdue for an all-ages Karaoke experience, and the party is finally here! Step into a dream-like world of joy and wonder with a Jim Henson meets Guitar Hero vibe — without the plastic guitars. 

Comforting, gentle, and putting the singer at ease in a space designed to keep you confident and fearless in belting our your most authentic and sincere performances of everything from Rick Astley to Rainbow Connection,  with likely lots more on the way…. This won’t just get you singing your heart out, it just might make you a better singer too!

reviews.review_title: Lacks feedback in response to signing
reviews.review_description:
Felt a little underwhelmed. Nice and simple presentation and was excited to sing, but there’s very little you can see in response to your singing. Very little feedback in terms of whether you’re going well or not.

Feel there’s a lot more that could be done here - make the environment come to life if you’re singing well, or dampen down if you’re failing. The other reviewers comment on pitch guidance in the environment, integrated, not as an add on to the microphone, is spot on. Ensure there’s some visual feedback and sensation as you sing rather than just reading the words on the TV and hope you did well.

Will hold on to it as a sign of faith in the direction. Please iterate.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for trying Songbird, and for your trust! This kind of feedback is incredibly helpful in prioritizing for the future. We can't wait for you to see what's coming, so stay tuned for updates! 

Also, you can turn off "Mic Pitch Tracker" in the options to display the pitch tracker on the lyric board.

reviews.review_description:
Brilliant start, looks great and plays well. Just need more of a collection of songs adding or even in DLC's to buy.

Lady in Red, Wonderwall, Angels, Father & Son, Sweet child of mine etc

Hope multiplayer gets added so we can sing with friends, great app so far.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Make sure to keep an eye on our socials for updates on features and new music.
